definition: A skos:ConceptScheme that partitions the statistical-measure space into the types of quantity a chart can depict
A skos:ConceptScheme that partitions temporal aggregation methods applied to chart data
A skos:ConceptScheme that partitions measurement-unit families used in energy chart axis labels
A skos:ConceptScheme that enumerates energy technologies and fuels referenced in chart text
notes: Instance of skos:ConceptScheme; ~40-60 members; only scheme with hierarchy

definition: A skos:ConceptScheme that classifies temporal resolution of chart data series
notes: Phase 2 — FixedDims, not a Variable facet

definition: A statisticType concept representing a cumulative quantity measured at a point in time
A statisticType concept representing a quantity accumulated over a time interval
A statisticType concept representing a monetary value per unit of energy commodity
A statisticType concept representing a dimensionless ratio of a part to a whole
A statisticType concept representing a discrete tally of items or events
An aggregation concept representing a single instantaneous measurement

synonyms: cumulative; as of; end of period
definition: An aggregation concept representing a running total measured at a period boundary
An aggregation concept representing the additive total over a period
An aggregation concept representing the arithmetic mean over a period
An aggregation concept representing the maximum observed value in a period
An aggregation concept representing the minimum observed value in a period
An aggregation concept representing a market clearing or settlement price

synonyms: GW; MW; kW; gigawatt; megawatt; kilowatt
definition: A unitFamily concept representing units of instantaneous energy conversion rate
A unitFamily concept representing units of cumulative energy quantity
A unitFamily concept representing monetary denomination units
A unitFamily concept representing compound units of price per energy quantity
A unitFamily concept representing units of carbon-dioxide-equivalent mass
A unitFamily concept representing compound units of emission rate per energy
A unitFamily concept representing ratios and percentages with no physical dimension
A unitFamily catch-all concept for units not classified into another family

synonyms: solar; solar PV; PV; photovoltaic; Solarenergie; Photovoltaik
definition: A technologyOrFuel concept representing solar photovoltaic generation technology
A technologyOrFuel concept representing wind energy generation technology (parent of onshore/offshore)
A technologyOrFuel concept representing land-based wind generation technology
A technologyOrFuel concept representing sea-based wind generation technology
A technologyOrFuel concept representing electrochemical energy storage technology
A technologyOrFuel concept representing the aggregate of renewable energy technologies
A technologyOrFuel concept representing nuclear fission power generation technology
A technologyOrFuel concept representing coal-based power generation technology (parent of brown coal)
A technologyOrFuel concept representing lignite-based power generation technology
notes: OEO:00000251; ENTSO-E B02; narrower than Coal

definition: A technologyOrFuel concept representing heat pump technology for heating and cooling
A technologyOrFuel concept representing hydrogen production and fuel cell technology
A technologyOrFuel concept representing natural gas power generation technology (parent of GasCcgt)

synonyms: CCGT; combined cycle; combined cycle gas turbine
definition: A technologyOrFuel concept representing combined-cycle gas turbine technology
A frequency concept representing hourly temporal resolution
A frequency concept representing daily temporal resolution
A frequency concept representing weekly temporal resolution
A frequency concept representing monthly temporal resolution
A frequency concept representing quarterly temporal resolution
A frequency concept representing annual temporal resolution
A reified annotation that links a surface form string to its provenance metadata on a concept
notes: N-ary relation pattern; one instance per altLabel-provenance pair

definition: A SKOS property linking a concept to its parent ConceptScheme
notes: Standard SKOS; no custom definition needed

definition: A SKOS property holding the canonical preferred label of a concept
A SKOS property holding an alternative surface form for a concept
notes: Standard SKOS; carries EN and DE language tags

definition: A SKOS property linking a narrower concept to its broader parent
notes: Standard SKOS; used only in TechnologyOrFuelScheme

definition: A SKOS property holding the genus-differentia definition of a concept
A SKOS mapping property asserting exact cross-ontology equivalence
notes: Standard SKOS; used in SSSOM mappings

definition: A SKOS mapping property asserting approximate cross-ontology equivalence
notes: Standard SKOS; primary mapping relation to OEO

definition: A SKOS mapping property asserting the target is broader than the source
A custom property linking a concept to a SurfaceFormEntry individual
A custom data property holding the altLabel string that a SurfaceFormEntry annotates
A custom data property holding the provenance tag of a surface form entry
notes: Domain: SurfaceFormEntry; Range: xsd:string; constrained to 7 SurfaceFormProvenance values

definition: A SKOS annotation property holding free-text notes on a SurfaceFormEntry
notes: Required when provenance is agent-curated or eval-feedback
